app.title: Drug-Herb–Food Interaction Checker
app.disclaimer: *For information only. Not a substitute for professional advice.

search.title: Search drugs / herbs / foods
search.placeholder: Type a name, e.g., warfarin, ginkgo, grapefruit, simvastatin

cond.title: Disease-to-Drug Suggestion
cond.placeholder: Type a disease, e.g., diabetes, hypertension

results.title: Results
results.emptyNote: *Note: No results does not guarantee safety. Please consult a healthcare professional, especially if you have chronic conditions, are pregnant, or are taking multiple products.
results.consumerAdviceLine: If you are unsure about using these together, consult your doctor or pharmacist first.

modeLabel.pro: Expert mode – detailed mechanisms and mechanism-based suggested pairs

results.inferredDisclaimer: These pairs are inferred from PK/PD mechanisms and may not have direct clinical evidence. Use alongside professional judgement and external literature.
